data.title: Betters predict higher odds of Trump admin releasing undisclosed Epstein files this month. Odds jump 11% to 22% in 24hrs.Total of $156,000 wagered.
data.description: As controversy swirls around the Jeffrey Epstein client list, cryptocurrency bettors are increasingly confident that the Trump administration may release undisclosed files connected to the convicted sex offender. Polymarket's odds for the betting contract "Will Trump release more Epstein files before August?" surged by 11 percentage points to 22% within 24 hours. Additionally, the likelihood of the files being revealed by the end of August rose by 7 percentage points to 48%, while the chances of disclosure before the end of the year increased by 15 percentage points to 65%. Bookmakers have placed bets exceeding $156,000 on this July event.
Health insurers seek 2026 ACA marketplace plans rate raises: WSJ

data.title: Onchain platforms like Hyperliquid and Solana excel in PUMP Token trading, surpassing traditional exchanges in liquidity.
data.description: The increasing significance of onchain platforms is underscored by Pump.fun's ICO and premarket trading. Platforms like Hyperliquid and Solana are gaining dominance, surpassing traditional exchanges in both liquidity and reliability. This trend signifies a shift towards decentralized trading platforms, with Pump.fun leading the way in this movement.

data.title: Public media funding reductions were long-term, impacting NPR and PBS for years.
data.description: A recent study found that approximately 37% of Americans have experienced symptoms of anxiety during the COVID-19 pandemic. The research, conducted on a sample size of 2,000 adults, highlighted that feelings of worry and stress have become more prevalent since the outbreak. Additionally, around 65% of participants reported they felt isolated and lonely at some point during the past year. These findings shed light on the mental health impact of the ongoing crisis, emphasizing the importance of providing support and resources for individuals struggling with anxiety and related issues in the current climate.

data.title: US farmers wary as 100% tariffs on Russian goods may spike urea prices, impacting corn and row crop yields.
data.description: The proposal put forth by President Trump to implement a 100 percent tariff on products from Russia has the potential to significantly impact the price of urea, a crucial fertilizer used in corn and various other row crops.

data.title: Trump criticizes emerging economies' group BRICS (Brazil, Russia, China, India), putting India in a tight spot.
data.description: The President's criticism of the coalition of developing nations, comprising Brazil, Russia, and China, has placed India in a difficult position.

data.title: Truemed, a startup founded by an aide to RFK Jr., offers tax breaks on meat and mattresses, raising questions about eligibility.
data.description: Truemed, a new startup, offers individuals the opportunity to purchase meat and mattresses using funds exempt from federal income taxation. The question arises as to whether this tax benefit is applicable in this scenario.

data.title: An increase in health insurers denying drug claims revealed in data, with major private insurers showing a rise.
data.description: New data reveals a notable increase in rejected insurance claims among major private insurers, providing a unique insight into this usually hidden aspect of the industry.

data.title: Ripple CEO praises GENIUS Act as historic, transformative legislation similar to Dodd-Frank Act. Bill secured 308-122 House approval, marking a 15-year gap in financial regulations. GENIUS Act to be signed by President Trump, regulating stablecoins. XRP hits all-time high of $3.84.
data.description: Brad Garlinghouse, CEO of Ripple Labs, praised the passage of the GENIUS Act as a game-changing legislation for the U.S. financial industry, comparable to the Dodd-Frank Act. The bill received overwhelming House approval at 308-122, marking the first significant financial regulation in 15 years. The GENIUS Act, awaiting President Trump's signature, focuses on regulating stablecoins like Ripple's RLUSD, tied to assets such as the U.S. dollar. Garlinghouse lauded bipartisan support for the bill and highlighted the potential for the U.S. to lead in financial innovation. Ripple's XRP cryptocurrency recently reached a record high of $3.84, buoyed by the potential impact of the new legislation. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: $79B surge in Memecoin market indicates limited investment options. Neiro rep sees memecoins as appealing, but Xion CEO criticizes impact on crypto image.
data.description: The community lead of Neiro, identified as S, hailed memecoins as the most captivating sector within the cryptocurrency industry. In contrast, Anthony Anzalone, the CEO of Xion, argued that memecoins are tarnishing the reputation of the entire crypto market.

data.title: Together AI accelerates inference speed with NVIDIA's Blackwell GPUs, achieving world's fastest DeepSeek-R1-0528 model with NVIDIA HGX B200 for real-world AI applications.
data.description: Together AI has revealed the latest breakthrough in AI technology, achieving the fastest inference speed for the DeepSeek-R1-0528 model by leveraging the NVIDIA HGX B200 system. This advancement significantly boosts AI capabilities for practical and real-world applications. The impressive performance improvements will undoubtedly revolutionize AI processing, with the model now outperforming any previous benchmarks. This development marks a significant milestone in the field of artificial intelligence, setting a new standard for speed and efficiency.
